title: KillStreakReward
description: A Plugin That Lets You Get Rewards Or Just BroadCast In Chat When You Get A Specfic Kill Streak
body:
# **KillStreakReward**

Give your players rewards for kill streaks!  
This lightweight plugin tracks player kill streaks and gives rewards (items or commands) when they reach certain thresholds. Fully configurable, simple to use, and colorful in-game messages.

------------------------------------------------------------

## ✨ Features
- Tracks kill streaks (resets on death).
- /killstreak command to view your streak.
- /killstreak reload (for admins) to reload the config.
- Action bar messages showing streak count.
- Configurable rewards per kill streak threshold.
- Rewards can be items, commands, or none.
- Optional broadcasts, titles, and sounds when streaks are hit.
- Works on Minecraft 1.20+ (Paper/Spigot).

------------------------------------------------------------

## 📝 Commands
- /killstreak → Show your current kill streak.
- /killstreak reload → Reload config (admin only).

------------------------------------------------------------

## 🔑 Permissions
- killstreak.use → Allows /killstreak (default: everyone).
- killstreak.admin → Allows /killstreak reload (default: OP).

------------------------------------------------------------

## 🛠️ How to use
1. Drop the plugin jar into your server’s plugins/ folder.
2. Restart the server (a config.yml will be created).
3. Edit config.yml to set your thresholds and rewards.
4. Run /killstreak reload to apply changes.

------------------------------------------------------------
✅ Simple. Flexible. Perfect for PvP servers.
